MOTION To Be Relieved As Council; Decl. In Support
Off Calendar Nov-20-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Charles A. Browning, Esq. of MOORE & BROWNING 956-6500 moving to be relieved as counsel of record for the Plaintiff
Plaintiff SUN IM KANG present in court with her friend Mr. David Alex

Counsel provided copies of his papers to the Court. The Court having reviewed the documents and Ms. KANG having no objection to her counsel withdrawing from the case, GRANTED the motion. (sl) JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
